prestazioni: 3.5L 2GR-FKS V6 (308hp stock) forced induction via Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger with billet compressor wheel, 64mm turbine, and 0.82 A/R turbine housing, paired with a Tomei 80mm titanium wastegate for precise boost control up to 18psi on E85 fuel

Full bolt-on internals upgrade including Manley forged pistons (9.0:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series main/rod bearings, paired with a GSC Power-Division Stage 2 camshaft (224°/230° duration, 0.550" lift) for optimized airflow in the 2GR-FKS

Custom Motec M150 ECU with flex-fuel sensor and dual Bosch 028 high-flow fuel pumps, feeding ID1000x injectors and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator, while a CSF aluminum radiator with dual SPAL 16" fans ensures thermal stability under sustained boost
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Tacoma-specific) with carbon fiber fenders, overfenders, and front bumper, paired with a custom 3M Gloss Black wrap and red pinstriping for aggressive stance and wheel clearance

Ohlins DFV 2.0 coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression/rebound/height) and 2.5" front/2.0" rear drop, paired with Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and poly bushings for chassis rigidity
Custom bed cage fabricated from 1.5" DOM tubing with integrated LED light bar mounts and a Rhino Rack Pioneer platform, finished in powder-coated TRD Pro Cement Gray to match the factory color scheme
